zh.lifeSummary: Edward Wylley是John Wylley和Mrs John Wylley的兒子，於大約1460年出生在英國英格蘭艾可蕾托 哈林波利。他於大約1485年與Agnes Clere在英國英格蘭賀特福爾比曉普也斯 斯托特福德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1523年9月在英國英格蘭賀特福爾利享年64歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Edward Wylley是John Wylley和Mrs John Wylley的儿子，于大约1460年出生在英国英格兰艾可蕾托 哈林波利。他于大约1485年与Agnes Clere在英国英格兰賀特福爾比曉普也斯 斯托特福德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1523年9月在英国英格兰賀特福爾利享年64岁。

nameMeanings.name: Wylley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Staffordshire, Cheshire, and Lancashire): variant of   Whaley  .

variants.name: Whaley
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from Whalley (Lancashire) or Whaley in Bolsover (Derbyshire). The Lancashire placename may derive from Old English hwæl ‘hill’ + lēah ‘wood, woodland clearing’. The Derbyshire placename may derive from Old English wall ‘wall’, walh ‘Welshman, foreigner’ (genitive plural wala), or wælla ‘well, spring, stream’ + lēah.

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

en.lifeSummary: Edward Wylley was born about 1460, in Little Hallingbury, Essex, England, United Kingdom as the son of John Wylley and Mrs John Wylley. He married Agnes Clere about 1485, in Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died in September 1523, in Thorley, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 64.

Il a épousé Agnes Clere environ 1485, à Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en septembre 1523, à Thorley, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 64 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Edward Wylleyは約1460年にイギリスイギリスエセックスリットル ハリングブリーでJohn WylleyとMrs John Wylleyの息子として生まれた。約1485年にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアビショプ'ス ストルトフォードでAgnes Clereと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1523年9月にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアソルリーで64歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Edward Wylley(은)는 대략 1460년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 리틀 핼링버이에서 John Wylley(와)과 Mrs John Wylley의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1485년 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 비숍'스 스토르트퍼드에서 Agnes Clere(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1523년 9월 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 토를리에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Edward Wylley родился около 1460 г. в местности литл холлингбури, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. Его родителей звали John Wylley и Mrs John Wylley. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Clere около 1485 г. в местности бишоп'с стортфорд, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер сентябрь 1523 г. в местности таурли, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 64 лет.
